title: Halliburton Investor Relations
note: Investor overview describing Halliburton as one of the world's largest providers of products and services to the energy industry across the reservoir lifecycle.

title: 2026 Proxy Statement & 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary annual-report source for 2025 revenue, operating income, net income, free cash flow, segment discussion, facilities, and business-cycle context.

title: Halliburton Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for Halliburton's June 2026 market capitalization and public-company ranking.

title: Halliburton P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for Halliburton's trailing P/E ratio as of June 2026.

title: Halliburton Drilling
note: Product source for Halliburton drilling, directional drilling, drilling optimization, sensors, and well-construction capabilities.

title: Halliburton Well Completions
note: Product source for intelligent completions, flow control, downhole valves, completion tools, and production optimization.

title: Halliburton Stimulation Operations
note: Product source for Halliburton hydraulic fracturing, OCTIV digital fracturing, Sensori monitoring, ZEUS electric fracturing, automation, and stimulation workflows.

title: The Open Group OSDU Forum
note: Open-source, standards-based subsurface data platform source for interoperable energy data and multi-vendor application development.

title: WITSML Data Standards
note: Open, non-proprietary drilling, completions, and interventions data standard used for rig-site-to-office and multi-party data exchange.

title: PRODML Data Standards
note: Production-data standard source for optimized well operations, production reporting, DTS/DAS data, flow networks, well tests, and time-series data.

title: PorePy: An Open-Source Simulation Tool for Flow and Transport in Deformable Fractured Rocks
note: Research source documenting PorePy as an open-source framework for flow, transport, and deformation in fractured reservoirs, including geothermal stimulation examples.

title: PorePy GitHub Repository
note: Public repository for the PorePy open-source simulation code.

title: Enhanced Geothermal Systems
note: Government source for enhanced geothermal systems, wellbore construction cost challenges, wells of opportunity, oil-and-gas technology transfer, and geothermal manufacturing prize context.
